# slim-select

The `noi-select` component uses [slim-select](https://github.com/brianvoe/slim-select)
as a third-party dependency.

- Package: `slim-select`
- Version: see `package.json`
- License: MIT
- Copyright: Brian Voelker

The library is imported in `src/blocks/select/select.component.tsx` and its CSS is
bundled from `node_modules/slim-select/dist/slimselect.css`.
